module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if(reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
